stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
GEN 1 can be used to feed the DC ESS BUS: (NB: all contactors not mentioned are assumed to remain open)

options.a: via AC BUS 1 and AC ESS BUS, when C1.1, C1.4, C3.1, C3.2 and C5.2 are closed.
options.b: via AC BUS 1 and AC ESS BUS, when C1.1, C3.1 and C5.2 are closed.
options.c: via AC BUS 1 when C1.4, C3.2 and C5.2 are closed.
options.d: via AC BUS 1, when C1.1, C3.1 and C5.2 are closed.
